notes: Arturia Korg MS-20 V emulates the legendary Korg MS-20 semi-modular synthesizer, famous for its aggressive, characterful dual-filter design. The MS-20 uses two cascaded filters: a high-pass filter (VCF1) followed by a low-pass filter (VCF2), each with its own resonance control — this configuration allows the instrument to produce sounds ranging from nasal, band-passed tones to brutal, self-oscillating leads and bass. Two oscillators, two envelope generators, and an extensive patch bay make it one of the most versatile semi-modular instruments ever built. The MS-20 V adds a virtual patch bay and additional modulation options beyond the hardware original, making it suited for experimental basses, leads, percussion, and sound effects.

Expression.description: VCA output level — expression control for dynamics

Modulation.description: Modulation wheel — wheel modulation routed per patch

VCF2 LPF Cutoff.description: VCF2 low-pass filter cutoff — primary brightness control; self-oscillates at max resonance

VCF1 HPF Cutoff.description: VCF1 high-pass filter cutoff — removes low frequencies; combining with LPF creates band-pass character

VCF2 Resonance.description: VCF2 resonance/peak — the MS-20's aggressive resonant peak; drive to extremes for screaming leads

VCF1 Resonance.description: VCF1 high-pass resonance — adds a secondary peak at the HPF frequency

EG1 Attack.description: Envelope Generator 1 attack — primarily modulates VCF cutoff

EG1 Release.description: Envelope Generator 1 release — VCF envelope release time

EG2 Attack.description: Envelope Generator 2 attack — primarily modulates VCA

EG2 Release.description: Envelope Generator 2 release — VCA envelope release time

LFO Rate.description: LFO rate — modulation speed for vibrato, tremolo, or filter wobble

LFO Depth.description: LFO depth — modulation amount applied to target

Osc2 Waveform.description: Oscillator 2 waveform selection — set differently from OSC1 for richer timbres

Osc2 Detune.description: Oscillator 2 detune — fine pitch offset for chorusing and thickening

Reverb.description: Reverb send level — adds space to the MS-20's direct, dry character
